$description: Blur radius scale for backdrop/frosted-glass effects and overlays. Use restraint — glass is a once-per-view effect (see taste/design-taste.md).

sm.$description: Subtle frost — small popovers, tags over imagery

md.$description: Default glass — cards, sticky headers over content

lg.$description: Strong frost — modal backdrops, navigation overlays

xl.$description: Heavy frost — full-screen scrims, immersive overlays
